aids.title: OSI Layer Mnemonics
aids.content:
Top-Down (7→1):
"All People Seem To Need Data Processing"

Bottom-Up (1→7):
"Please Do Not Throw Sausage Pizza Away"

A-P-S-T-N-D-P

aids.title: PDU Names
aids.content:
Layer 4: Segment
Layer 3: Packet
Layer 2: Frame
Layer 1: Bits

"Some People Fear Bits"
